title: Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African dish made with lamb, tunisian spices, and tender vegetables.

ingredients.name: Tunisian spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat the oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onions, ginger, and garlic and cook until the onions are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots, Tunisian spices, and bitter orange juice. Stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven. Braise the lamb and vegetables for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
